hero.title: About POSCAR Digital
hero.description: POSCAR Digital is a leader in smart education, accounting, attendance, and ERP solutions, creating a complete digital eco-platform to empower organizations and individuals.

profile.title: Our Company Profile
profile.description: POSCAR Digital was established with a mission to reshape digital landscapes, providing end-to-end solutions for SMEs and educational institutions across Cambodia and beyond. Our innovative platforms, including Wiki School and Vithean, are transforming education and business operations.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: From a Phnom Penh startup to a national digital partner.

timeline.title: POSCAR Digital is founded
timeline.description: The team establishes POSCAR Digital in Phnom Penh — building the foundation for what would become Cambodia's digital eco-platforms.

timeline.title: WikiSchool launches
timeline.description: Our first product — school management for kindergarten and K12 institutions across Cambodia.

timeline.title: National exam scoring under MoEYS
timeline.description: Begin annual operation of the high school national exam scoring system.

timeline.title: WikiTV during COVID-19
timeline.description: Launch Cambodia's first national education broadcast as a public-good contribution to MoEYS.

timeline.title: Vithean goes to AWS
timeline.description: First SaaS product on AWS — accounting and ERP for SMEs across Cambodia.

timeline.title: Full cloud migration
timeline.description: All major platforms running on AWS with high availability and horizontal scaling.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To establish a complete digital eco-platform for education and business operations, supporting SMEs in Cambodia through innovative solutions like Wiki School and Vithean.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To engage educational institutions and SMEs in a complete digital eco-system, empowering them with smart technology and resources through our comprehensive platforms.

wikitv.title: Reaching the nation: WikiTV
paragraphs: When schools across Cambodia closed during COVID-19, POSCAR launched WikiTV — a fully managed national education broadcast platform — as a direct contribution to MoEYS and the Cambodian public.

WikiTV wasn't just a media response. It was an end-to-end digital broadcast solution built and operated entirely in-house, using POSCAR's own infrastructure and broadcast engineering. Today, WikiTV continues to operate as one of Cambodia's dedicated education TV channels — reaching students and schools nationwide.

tech.title: Built on real infrastructure
tech.description: From in-house data centers to AWS-native deployment, we run the foundations that other companies outsource.

items.title: In-house data center
items.description: We designed and ran our own data center — 13+ enterprise servers across 3 racks, with redundancy and security engineered for production loads.

items.title: AWS-native by 2023
items.description: Migrated Vithean to AWS in 2021. By 2023, all major platforms — including WikiSchool and WikiCollege — were running in the cloud with horizontal scaling.

items.title: National-scale operations
items.description: Annual operation of the national high school exam scoring system under MoEYS since 2019.

items.title: ISO 9001 + ITIL aligned
items.description: Sprint-based delivery, change management, incident response, and quality audits aligned with international service-management standards.

values.title: Our Value Proposition
items: We enable our clients to maximize their business horizon in the most convenient and secure manner.
Ensuring our clients stay connected to their operations and stakeholders at all times.
Providing innovative solutions tailored to unique business needs.
